---
title: "Linear & Generalized Linear Models"
sidebar: false
toc: false
---

[← All courses](../teaching.qmd){.back-link}

::: {.page-intro}
A second-year **2A ENSAI** course, taught in collaboration with Frédéric Lavancier. It covers
the linear model — definition, inference, validation, selection and ANOVA/ANCOVA — and then
generalizes to logistic, categorical and counting models. Most resources are adapted from
[Frédéric Lavancier's teaching materials](https://lavancier-f.github.io/my-website/Ressources.html).
:::

## The Linear Model

::: {.aurora-card-grid}
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🧭</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Introduction</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">From correlation and covariance to least squares, significance and over-fitting.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/introduction.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">📐</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Definition of the Linear Model</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">The model and OLS estimator, the regression plane, and collinearity.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/linear_model.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🎯</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Inference</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Estimators, confidence &amp; prediction intervals, and Student / Fisher tests.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/inference.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🔎</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Validation</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Residuals, R² / R²ₐ, VIF, leverage, outliers and Cook's distance.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/validation.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🧮</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Model Selection</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Cₚ, AIC, BIC, adjusted R², and forward / backward stepwise selection.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/selection.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">📊</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">ANOVA / ANCOVA</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Factors, interactions, and mixing factors with continuous covariates.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="slides/anova_ancova.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
:::

## The Generalized Linear Model

::: {.aurora-card-grid}
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🔗</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Introduction to GLM</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Exponential families, link functions, and the GLM framework.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="../glm/slides/Introduction_glm.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🪙</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Logistic Model</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Binary outcomes: odds, the logit link, and interpretation.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="../glm/slides/logistic_model.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🗂️</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Models for Categorical Data</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Multinomial and ordinal responses.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="../glm/slides/categorical_data.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
<div class="aurora-card">
  <span class="aurora-card__icon">🔢</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__title">Counting Models</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__desc">Poisson and over-dispersed models for count data.</span>
  <span class="aurora-card__res">
    <a class="res-btn res-btn--primary" href="../glm/slides/counting_models.qmd"><span class="res-btn__icon">▶</span> Slides</a>
  </span>
</div>
:::

## Exercises

::: {.resource-grid}
[TD1](TD/TD1.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD2-5](TD/TD2-5.qmd){.resource-chip}
[TD6-8](TD/TD6-8.qmd){.resource-chip}
:::
